## Description
Provide a clear summary of the changes and the problem they solve.

## Linked Issues
Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Code cleanup / Refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification Performed
Describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes:
1. Local unit tests run: `.\build\Release\ghostreplay_tests.exe`
2. Manual verification steps performed:

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style and guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings during build.
- [ ] I have verified that unit tests pass locally.
- [ ] I have run the `package_portable` target and verified that the package licensing audit passes.
